faqs.question: What spider species are common in Marine Park homes?
faqs.answer: Marine Park residents commonly encounter house spiders, cellar spiders, wolf spiders, and occasionally black widows near outdoor storage areas. The neighborhood's proximity to Marine Park and wooded areas can attract outdoor spider species that wander indoors, especially in fall. Our technicians are experienced in identifying and treating all spider species found in Brooklyn homes.
